message:
test(doctor): add workspace scan and report export script validation tests

Expand the doctor full-stack reference project test matrix with coverage
for the workspace scan and report export e2e scripts:

- Add script loader helpers for workspace scan and report export scripts
- Add unique_test_seed() for deterministic but collision-free test seeds
- Add write_executable_script() helper with Unix chmod 0o755
- Add find_artifact_dir_by_suite_and_seed() for locating artifacts in
  structured output directories
- Add tests validating script structure, required shell functions,
  staging directory lifecycle, artifact manifest generation, and
  deterministic seed plumbing for both new script types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
